---
name: Security Review
about: Track security-sensitive changes before release
title: "Security review: "
labels: security
assignees: fg529kcrsc-web
---

## Change Scope

- Describe the security-sensitive change.

## Checks

- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Network exposure reviewed
- [ ] Authentication and authorization reviewed
- [ ] Logging avoids sensitive data
- [ ] Dependency review completed
- [ ] Rollback path documented

## Decision

- [ ] Approved
- [ ] Needs changes
